---
title: "`r yaml::read_yaml(here::here('config', 'config.yml'))$report_title`"
author: "Group 7 — DATA 550"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
config <- yaml::read_yaml(here::here("config", "config.yml"))
```

## Configuration

This report was generated with the following parameters:

- **Age range**: `r config$age_range[1]` to `r config$age_range[2]`
- **Sex filter**: `r config$sex_filter`
- **Confirmed COVID only**: `r config$confirmed_only`
- **Data file**: `r config$data_file`

---

# 1. Demographics and Comorbidity Profile

## Table 1 — Patient Demographics Summary

```{r table-1}
readRDS(here::here("output", "coder_a", "table_1.rds"))
```

## Figure 1 — Age Distribution by Sex

```{r fig-1}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("output/coder_a/fig1_age_distribution.png"), rel_path = FALSE)
```

## Figure 2 — Comorbidity Prevalence

```{r fig-2}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("output/coder_a/fig2_comorbidity_prevalence.png"), rel_path = FALSE)
```

---

# 2. COVID Severity and Healthcare Utilization

## Table 2 — COVID Classification Distribution

```{r table-2}
readRDS(here::here("output", "coder_b", "table_2.rds"))
```

## Figure 3 — Patient Type by Age Group

```{r fig-3}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("output/coder_b/fig3_patient_type_age.png"), rel_path = FALSE)
```

## Figure 4 — Medical Unit Type Distribution

```{r fig-4}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("output/coder_b/fig4_medical_unit.png"), rel_path = FALSE)
```

---

# 3. Clinical Outcomes Analysis

## Table 3 — Outcome Summary (Confirmed Cases)

```{r table-3}
readRDS(here::here("output", "coder_c", "table_3.rds"))
```

## Figure 5 — Mortality Rate by Age Group

```{r fig-5}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("output/coder_c/fig5_mortality_age.png"), rel_path = FALSE)
```

## Figure 6 — Outcomes by Number of Comorbidities

```{r fig-6}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("output/coder_c/fig6_outcomes_comorbidity.png"), rel_path = FALSE)
```
